title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: She organised the whole event on her own.

questions.firstSentence: It isn't obligatory to wear a tie.
This is the most exciting match I have ever watched.
questions.secondSentence: I have (1) _________ such an exciting match.

questions.firstSentence: Tom is not as creative as his colleague Lisa.
He regrets spending so much money on the car.
questions.secondSentence: He (1) _________ so much money on the car.

questions.firstSentence: My boss allowed me to work from home.
In spite of the noise, she fell asleep quickly.
questions.secondSentence: She fell asleep quickly (1) _________ there was a lot of noise.
